statement.en: Supervised additive models can decompose and extrapolate single-cell expression aligned with known gene programs
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026-04-25, future-dated or recent submission) with embargoed full abstract. The core claim—that supervised additive models can decompose and extrapolate single-cell expression aligned with known gene programs—is technically sound in principle (additive models are CLASS-A formalizable; single-cell genomics is CLASS-B), but without access to the full abstract, methods, results, or validation, the axiom remains provisional and unvalidated. FLOWING is appropriate for peer-reviewed-pending computational biology claims.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 遺伝子は既知の生物学的プログラムの線形な重ね合わせとして自然に現れる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 個々の細胞は既知の遺伝子プログラムの交点として、幾何学的に再構成される。
